key_factors.text_cn: 阿根廷赛前称Messi、Emiliano Martínez、Álvarez均fit，核心可用性支撑其上限。
key_factors.text_en: Argentina say Messi, Emiliano Martinez and Alvarez are all fit, and that core availability underpins their ceiling.

key_factors.text_cn: 阿根廷可拉开宽度并在边路造人数优势，让Enzo和Mac Allister前插接应。
key_factors.text_en: Argentina can stretch the width and build numerical advantages out wide, letting Enzo and Mac Allister push up in support.

key_factors.text_cn: Messi腿筋、Álvarez脚踝、Nico Paz膝伤曾被提及，核心状态仍带来不确定性。
key_factors.text_en: Messi's hamstring, Alvarez's ankle and Nico Paz's knee have all been mentioned, so the core players' condition still brings uncertainty.

key_factors.text_cn: Reuters称阿根廷依赖2022年经验阵容，Messi将参加创纪录第六届世界杯。
key_factors.text_en: Reuters reports Argentina lean on their experienced 2022 squad, with Messi set to play a record sixth World Cup.

key_factors.text_cn: 阿尔及利亚已在Rock Chalk Park备战揭幕战，训练中包括门将专项练习。
key_factors.text_en: Algeria have been preparing for their opener at Rock Chalk Park, with sessions including dedicated goalkeeper work.

key_factors.text_cn: 堪萨斯城夜间部分多云、低温约64°F，西南风和阵风是比赛环境变量。
key_factors.text_en: Kansas City has partly cloudy night skies with a low around 64°F; southwesterly winds and gusts are environmental variables.
